zh.lifeSummary: 當Jane Drury於大約1435年出生在英國素福爾可易可沃斯時，她的父親Henry Drury13歲，母親Elizabeth Eaton17歲。她於1451年與Thomas Harvey在英國素福爾可易可沃斯結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1475年在英國英格蘭素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲聖 馬也斯 邱奇享年41歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭可瓦爾聖 馬雷斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jane Drury于大约1435年出生在英国素福爾可易可沃斯时，她的父亲Henry Drury13岁，母亲Elizabeth Eaton17岁。她于1451年与Thomas Harvey在英国素福爾可易可沃斯结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1475年在英国英格兰素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲聖 馬也斯 邱奇享年41岁，埋葬在英国英格兰可瓦爾聖 馬雷斯。

nameMeanings.name: Drury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Jane Drury was born about 1435, in Ickworth, Suffolk, England, her father, Henry Drury, was 13 and her mother, Elizabeth Eaton, was 17. She married Thomas Harvey in 1451, in Ickworth, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1475, in St Mary's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 41, and was buried in Saint Marys, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jane Drury est née environ 1435, à Ickworth, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Henry Drury, avait 13 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Eaton, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Harvey en 1451, à Ickworth, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1475, à St Mary's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterrée à Saint Marys, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie starb 1475 im Alter von 41 Jahren in St Mary's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Saint Marys, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ko.St Marys Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffol: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈 스트 마이'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Jane Drury(이)가 대략 1435년 영국 수폴크 이ck워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Drury(은)는 13세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Eaton(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1451년 영국 수폴크 이ck워스에서 Thomas Harvey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1475년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈 스트 마이'스 c후르치에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 세인트 마이스에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Thomas Harvey em 1451, em Ickworth, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1475, em St Mary's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 41 anos, e foi sepultada em Saint Marys, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St Marys Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffol: ст мэри'с чурч, бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jane Drury родилась около 1435 г. в местности иккворт, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry Drury было 13 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Eaton, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Harvey в 1451 г. в местности иккворт, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1475 г. в местности ст мэри'с чурч, бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 41 год и была похоронена в местности сеинт мэрис, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания.
